violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the dish machine was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Unit can only be used to rinse until serviced. Equipment must be sanitized in 3-bay. The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. 3-bay dispenser to be serviced. Establishment to use a bleach sanitizing solution to sanitize all dishes. Establishment must test solution to ensure adequate ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Weiners were observed held at 111 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit was turned up. Weiners must be held at least at 135 degrees. Weiners were reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Potatoes were placed warm in the refrigerator in covered containers. Potatoes were cooked earlier in the morning. Potatoes were uncovered. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
Cold water is unavailable at the hand wash sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
